name: The Astral Astrolabe
description: Realign a navigational tool pointing into the void using a heat-induced gear slip.

flaws.name: Engage Sun Lens
flaws.flavor_text: Expose the solar optics to focus extreme, concentrated heat on the mechanical gears.

flaws.name: Force Moon Gear Slip
flaws.flavor_text: Under high heat, force the stripped moon-gear to slip backward.

flaws.name: Align Void Prism
flaws.flavor_text: With the gear slipped, the void-prism aligns perfectly, dropping the navigations data.
